reports.description: Numerous wind damage (including many damaged roofs and snapped trees) were reported after the passage of a thunderstorm. A tornado was considered possible based on numerous eyewitness reports and the observed damage. [EDIT, 20.07.2026, Igor Laskowski] A video showing the tornado vortex has since emerged; therefore, the event has been reclassified as a tornado. Damage rating: DI: TRA / DoD 5 = IF1.5 (snapped exposed trees) / DI: BRC / DoD 1 = IF1.5
references: "Nawałnica nad gminą Osiek. Zerwane dachy, uszkodzone linie energetyczne [ZDJĘCIA]", Tyna.info.pl, 20 JUL 2026.
Storm Chasers Świętokrzyskie - Pogoda i Atmosfera (on Facebook), 19 JUL 2026.
Eyewitness report (on Facebook), 19 JUL 2026.
Ochotnicza Straż Pożarna w Połańcu (on Facebook), 20 JUL 2026.
OSP Ossala (on Facebook), 20 JUL 2026.
Eyewitness report via Storm Chasers Świętokrzyskie - Pogoda i Atmosfera (on Facebook), 19 JUL 2026. (on Facebook), 20 JUL 2026.
OSP Szwagrów (on Facebook), 20 JUL 2026.
Osp Suchowola (on Facebook), 20 JUL 2026.
